'''Tomrik''' was the largest [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] in the [[Bacrana system/Legends|Bacrana system]]. The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] consisted of swirling bands of gasses, colored bright orange and red. Sixteen satellites [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] the planet, most of them originating as [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]] captured from the [[Carba Asteroid Belt]]. [[Lant Mining Corporation]] conducted [[Mining/Legends|mining]] operations on three of Tomik's moons. The moons were strip-mined and abandoned.<ref name="FBS" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-04-XX -->''[[Flashpoint! Brak Sector]]''
